pi_items.source: Verified by sending an HTTP request and receiving a 200 OK response from the live en.wikipedia.org server.
Extracted from export_result.sh TARGET_FILE variable and task setup scripts.
Extracted from the SQLite query in export_result.sh which checks for b.title = 'OSINT Clean Reading'.
Confirmed via web search for Firefox's about:config reader.color_theme preferences and verified the extraction regex in export_result.sh.
Confirmed via knowledge of Firefox's about:config reader.font_type preferences and verified the extraction regex in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a live public URL (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open-source_intelligence). The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/osint_clean_extract.txt. The required bookmark title verified in the SQLite database is 'OSINT Clean Reading'. The expected Firefox Reader View configuration values parsed from prefs.js are 'dark' for reader.color_theme and 'serif' for reader.font_type.
